checks.description: Ensure that clk_div does not exhibit undefined (X) values after reset release, preserving safety without assuming fixed latency.
checks.pass_condition: clk_div remains defined (0 or 1) after reset deassertion; no X or Z values appear.
checks.trigger_condition: When the reset signal is deasserted.

checks.description: Observe that clk_div eventually toggles, indicating the divider is operational after reset release.
checks.pass_condition: clk_div transitions from a stable value to the opposite value at least once within a conservative observation window.
checks.trigger_condition: When the plan applies the basic operation after reset.
